title: SMP Essiantials
description: SMP Essiantails is a simple, configurable Minecraft plugin that adds item, enchantment, and potion limits, cooldowns, and unique features like the One Mace system to enhance SMP server gameplay.
body:
> # ⚠️ DISCONTINUED
This plugin is no longer maintained. All listed features are being rewritten and released as **separate, focused plugins** for better performance, flexibility, and long-term support.

---

> # SMP Essiantials
A powerful, lightweight plugin designed to enhance your Minecraft SMP experience with essential features, quality-of-life improvements, and robust server management tools.

> # Features
## Admin Tools
Admin Manager: Easily manage server staff, permissions, and admin actions.  
Commands Suite: A collection of useful commands for both players and admins.

## Gameplay Enhancements
- ### Combat Log  
Prevents unfair combat logging by tracking player combat status.
- ### Enchantment Limits  
Restrict overpowered enchantments to maintain game balance.
- ### Potion Limits  
Set limits on potion effects and durations for fair play.
- ### Item Limits & Cooldowns  
Control item usage frequency and restrict certain items as needed.
- ### Instant Restock  
Automatically restock items for smoother gameplay.

## Custom Items & Mechanics
- ### Netherite Limiting  
Restrict how many Netherite armor and tools in server can be.
- ### OneMace Manager  
Disables mace recipe when its crafted.

### Configuration
Easy Setup: All features are configurable via config.yml for maximum flexibility.  
Permissions Support: Integrates with permission plugins for granular control.
